title: Plantain Crumble Bites
description: A sweet and savory dessert made with ripe plantains, crumble topping, and a hint of tanginess.

ingredients.name: crumble topping (almond flour, coconut sugar, coconut oil)

instructions: Peel and slice the plantains into 1-inch rounds.
Place the plantain slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the honey over the plantains and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Bake the plantains for 15-20 minutes or until caramelized.
While the plantains are baking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing the almond flour, coconut sugar, and coconut oil in a bowl.
Once the plantains are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool slightly.
Top each plantain round with a spoonful of crumble topping and a dollop of tangy yogurt.
Place the baking sheet under the broiler for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
